subject: Son Goku (Dragon Ball Super, child era) — young spiky-haired fighter in orange gi with tail visible, in a forward charging stance with energy aura
description: A young male-presenting fighter with wild dark spiky hair charges forward in an orange gi. A tail is visible at the figure's back, marking this as the child-era Goku. Green and yellow energy swirls around the figure. The composition is a mid-shot from a low angle emphasizing forward drive and youthful energy. Expression is intense and joyful.
foreground: young dark-haired fighter in orange gi with tail, charging with green-yellow energy aura
background: green and yellow energy burst, indeterminate
emotion: fierce joy, unyielding drive, competitive excitement
